headline: Stock Market Today, March 24: Super Micro Computer Rises Despite Regulatory Scrutiny and Analyst Downgrades

headline: Dell Stock (DELL) Will Rise Further, Says Five-Star Analyst
summary: Bank of America (BAC) has raised its price target on Dell Technologies (DELL) even though the shares are currently trading near an all-time high. Wamsi Mohan, a top five-star rated analyst, writes in a note to clients that Dell will continue to benefit from “very robust” demand for artificial intelligence (A.I.) servers during an Asia supply-chain review.
